name: G-4 migrate-rubric: a real run writes the audit record at <emit-tree>/_meta/migration-from-rubric-yaml.md
command:
mkdir -p root/rubric && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-google-001
    provenance:
      - source: google-tsguide
' > root/rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD/root" --emit-tree "$PWD/out" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -s out/_meta/migration-from-rubric-yaml.md ] && echo audit_recorded 1>&2
